description_long: This rifle features a long, streamlined barrel with a robust rectangular receiver and a prominent, angular stock. The body is predominantly dark, likely finished in matte black, with a visible rail system along the top for mounting optics or accessories. The grip is sharply angled and ergonomic, positioned just behind the trigger guard, and the trigger itself is clearly defined. The muzzle end is squared off, possibly indicating a specialized muzzle device or protective shroud. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, with minimal embellishments and a focus on functionality. The rifle appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with some polymer components for the grip and stock.
description: A modern, long-barreled rifle with a matte black finish, angular stock, and ergonomic grip. Features a top rail and squared muzzle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the long barrel, angular stock, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and squared muzzle, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the same long barrel, stock, and grip from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the grip and trigger visible from behind.
